reviews.comment:
ACA , una empresa de " servicio" de verdad!! Llegamos al ACA Rio IV por una emergencia, toda su gente, playeros y la señorita que atendía el Full, se percataron de inmediato que no éramos solamente visitantes, se brindaron en exceso, súper serviciales y por demás cordiales  Destacado esto, quiero sobre destacar al chofer de la grúa JM Sta Cruz !!! ¿ Vocación y servicio? A este muchacho le sobra, su humanidad y empatía , hicieron de nuestro percance, un día reconfortante. Infinitamente gracias y felicitaciones a los concesionarios y a todo su staff .

(Translated by Google)
ACA, a truly "service" company! We arrived at the ACA Rio IV for an emergency, and everyone there—the attendants and the young woman at the Full service station—immediately realized we weren't just visitors. They went above and beyond, were incredibly helpful, and extremely friendly. I especially want to highlight the tow truck driver, JM Sta Cruz! Dedication and service? This young man has it in spades. His humanity and empathy turned our mishap into a pleasant experience. A huge thank you and congratulations to the dealership and all its staff.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Nico por tu valoración y comentario

reviews.comment:
De servicio nada tiene, te cobran la ficha para inflar las ruedas y solo aceptan efectivo, la atención no es buena y el servicio muy lerdo, solo cargo acá si no me queda otra opción, no es recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
They offer no service whatsoever; they charge you for the token to inflate the tires and only accept cash. The customer service is poor and very slow. I only refuel here if I have no other option; it's not recommended.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos la experiencia,si pudieras por privado ampliar tu comentario para ayudarnos a corregir estos inconvenientes
